variants.description: Drives zero output and therefore fails the stable waveform contract.
Implements a conventional count thermometer instead of the source-specific MSB/MSB/LSB mapping.
Incorrectly drives all thermometer outputs from the LSB.
Uses a threshold above the VDD high level, so asserted input bits are ignored.
Bin2ther 2b: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
